products.model: UPLIFT Custom Laminate L-Shaped Standing Desk
products.description: The UPLIFT Custom Laminate L-Shaped Standing Desk is designed for corner spaces, offering extensive surface area for multiple monitors and projects. It features a 1.19" thick custom laminate desktop, available in over 24 colors and 25 sizes, mounted on an award-winning UPLIFT V2 or V2-Commercial 3-leg height-adjustable frame. The frame provides a vertical travel range exceeding 25.5" with fast, individual leg motor adjustments, meeting ANSI/BIFMA X5.5-2021 standards for durability. The laminate desktops are Greenguard-Gold Certified for health and safety.
